description: Full-blown local Ollama Gemma 4 matrix: e4b, 12b, 31b on maintenance_value sparse + contract_visible, pass@1. Timeouts tuned so contract_visible does not stall on prompt prefill.

models.notes: Smallest Gemma 4. Sparse smoke proven at 62.8s. first_output_timeout raised to 300s for contract_visible prefill.
Second-smallest Gemma 4. Sparse ~120s/scenario. first_output_timeout raised to 600s for contract_visible prefill (was 240s, all rows stalled).
Largest installed Gemma 4. Sparse ~300s/scenario. first_output_timeout 600s, overall timeout 2400s for contract_visible.
